candidate_tools.description: Legacy compatibility wrapper for describe, search, and open operations over large content by ref or absolute file path.
Describe one content ref or absolute file path without loading the full body.
Copy one or more files or directory trees to new absolute destinations.
Delete one or more files or directory paths.
Edit one file in text-replace or line-range mode.
Move one or more files or directory trees to new absolute destinations.
Create a patch artifact without modifying the file.
Manage `.g3ku/config.json`, provider templates, drafts, bindings, and the ordered fallback chain for `ceo` / `execution` / `inspection`.
Install or import a skill from a GitHub repo/path into the current workspace skills directory, generating a minimal G3KU resource manifest when the upstream skill only ships SKILL.md.
Preview and delete one or more saved tasks.
List failed node ids inside a task tree.
View task node detail and related artifacts.
Inspect saved tasks, prompt previews, and disk usage.
Lightweight HTTP fetch for reading public web pages and extracting readable text without a browser runtime.

active_stage.stage_goal: 将用户提供的runtime tool contract上下文按原格式落盘到文件

exec_runtime_policy.summary: exec will execute shell commands without exec-side guardrails.
